---
name: Safety concern
about: Report a false negative (missed harm) or false positive (false alarm) to improve detection
title: "[safety] "
labels: safety, needs-triage
---

**Type**
- [ ] False negative — GuardianNode missed a real safety issue
- [ ] False positive — GuardianNode flagged something that wasn't actually a problem
- [ ] Other safety concern about the project

**What happened**
A description, with **no personal information** about your child or any other person. Synthetic / paraphrased examples are best.

**What we'd want GuardianNode to do instead**

**Category**
Which risk category should this involve? (grooming / off_platform_contact / bullying / self_harm / scam / phishing / sexual_content / threat / dangerous_challenge / other)

**Severity**
- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

**Conditions**
- App / website where this happened:
- Detection mode: screenshot OCR (vision/text classifier)
- Approximate child age group:

**Important**: Do NOT attach real chat logs, screenshots, or any content involving an actual child or perpetrator. Paraphrase examples in your own words.
